# PERF-96 negative: gRPC client reuses a single message struct across Recv calls
lang: go
file: PERF-096-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
)

type ItemRequest struct {
	Name string
}

type ItemStream interface {
	RecvMsg(m *ItemRequest) error
}

func Drain(stream ItemStream) error {
	msg := &ItemRequest{}
	for {
		if err := stream.RecvMsg(msg); err != nil {
			if err == io.EOF {
				return nil
			}
			return err
		}
		_ = msg
	}
}
